summary: Soundboard recording with noticeable hiss captures a sick 8/16 show, especially the second set.
review: Reviewers rave about the performance – calling it "sick" and highlighting an especially strong second set – but note that the tape hiss is audible. While the soundboard source provides decent clarity, some suggest seeking upgraded releases for a cleaner listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviewers give high marks for the show and its soundboard quality, while one points out hiss and recommends better versions; overall positive but technical flaws keep the rating from higher levels.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Noticeable tape hiss/tape noise; generally decent soundboard capture but not pristine.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out as a highlight; no specific song issues mentioned.
